2605.25382.title: AuthTrace: Diagnosing Evidence Construction in Thematically Dense Single-Author Corpora
2605.25382.paper_summary: Evidence construction systems--chunk retrieval, agent memory, knowledge-graph traversal, and thematic indexing--are evaluated on separate benchmarks with incompatible corpora and metrics, making cross-paradigm diagnosis impossible. We introduce AuthTrace, the first diagnostic benchmark that places all major paradigms on a single corpus and query set by exploiting the dual nature of single-author collections. Built on thematically dense corpora where all texts share style, topic, and vocabulary, AuthTrace provides 2,099 instances with exhaustive gold evidence and a fan-in gradient as the primary diagnostic axis. Comparing eight systems across two QA models, we find that (1) evidence recall--not precision--is the dominant predictor of answer quality (r = 0.96); (2) fan-in exposes paradigm-specific collapse patterns, with flat retrieval degrading 3x faster than structured-evidence systems; and (3) full-context prompting fails uniformly, establishing evidence construction as a necessary capacity beyond raw corpus exposure.
2605.25382.paper_summary_zh: 證據建構系統——片段檢索、代理記憶、知識圖譜遍歷和主題索引——在不同的基準上進行評估，這些基準使用不相容的語料庫和指標，使得跨範式診斷變得不可能。我們介紹了 AuthTrace，這是第一個診斷基準，它通過利用單一作者集合的雙重性質，將所有主要範式放置在單一語料庫和查詢集上。AuthTrace 建立在主題密集的語料庫上，所有文本共享風格、主題和詞彙，提供 2,099 個實例，並以全面的金證據和風險梯度作為主要診斷軸。比較八個系統在兩個 QA 模型上的表現，我們發現 (1) 證據召回率——而非精確度——是答案質量的主要預測因子 (r = 0.96)；(2) 風險梯度揭示了範式特定的崩潰模式，平坦檢索的降級速度是結構化證據系統的 3 倍；(3) 完整上下文提示均失敗，確立了證據建構作為超越原始語料庫暴露的必要能力。
2605.25382.author: Xiaoqing Wu et.al.
2605.25382.authors: Xiaoqing Wu, Feifei Li, Haoliang Ming, Wenhui Que
